channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - AI & Machine Learning
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: AI & Machine Learning

item.title: Development and Clinical Validation of an Automated Artificial Intelligence System for Bowel Wall Thickness Assessment in Adult Inflammatory Bowel Diseases.
item.description: Ultraschall in der Medizin (Stuttgart, Germany : 1980) - Intestinal ultrasound (IUS) is used to assess and monitor inflammatory bowel disease (IBD). Bowel wall thickness (BWT) is its key marker, but accurate measurement is operator-dependent and requires...

item.title: Multi-omics-based machine learning model predicts response and guides treatment in Crohn disease: a case study in nutritional therapy.
item.description: Inflammatory bowel diseases - Biomarkers are needed to predict treatment response and guide therapeutic decisions in Crohn disease (CD). We aimed to develop and validate a multi-omics machine learning (ML) model to predict resp...

item.title: Deep Learning-Driven Analysis and Quantification of Histopathological features in a DSS-induced Colitis Mouse Model.
item.description: The American journal of pathology - Dextran-based colitis model has been used extensively to study the pathophysiology of inflammatory bowel disease, including ulcerative colitis and Crohn's disease. Histological studies of animal co...

item.title: Conference Report: The FutuRE oF MinimalLy InvasivE GI and Capsule DiagnosTics (REFLECT), September 2025.
item.description: Diagnostics (Basel, Switzerland) - Capsule endoscopy (CE) is evolving from a primarily small-bowel imaging modality into a broader diagnostic platform that increasingly incorporates artificial intelligence (AI), robotic technologies...

item.title: Artificial Intelligence in Gastrointestinal Wireless Capsule Endoscopy: A Systematic Literature Review and Meta-Analysis.
item.description: Diagnostics (Basel, Switzerland) - Review - Background: Wireless capsule endoscopy is widely used for diagnosing gastrointestinal diseases, but manual interpretation of capsule videos is time-consuming and can vary between clinicians. Artifi...

item.title: Deciphering the macrophage ferroptosis regulatory network: construction of an ulcerative colitis diagnostic model and investigation of the immune microenvironment based on single-cell and transcriptomic data.
item.description: Frontiers in immunology - Ulcerative colitis (UC) is a chronic inflammatory bowel disease manifested as persistent mucosal inflammation and immune dysregulation. As key regulators of intestinal immune homeostasis, macrophag...
